decisions.reason: The workflow assurance requires incremental-ledger tests, but the workflow neither triggers on nor runs tests/test_cloudflare_incremental_certification.py.
The pull-request head is installed and executed in the same job that exposes Cloudflare secrets. Artifact scanning cannot prove PR-controlled code did not access or exfiltrate them.
The final gate trusts payload.passed, which is derived from the configured roster rather than independently enforcing the exact seven required IDs.
This documentation comment is the same root trust-boundary defect as reference-c7e8887d32872806.
The request itself contains the exact answer under required, and the verifier accepts the returned required object, permitting instruction echo to pass.
Raw substring checks allow rce to match source and auth to match unrelated words such as authoring, weakening coverage qualification.
budget_blocked has no associated UTC day, so a budget-only pause survives indefinitely instead of clearing on a later day.
The Scout fixture path is read without resolved-root containment, allowing an absolute path or parent traversal to send an out-of-root file to the provider.
The process-local lock and shared temporary filename do not serialize concurrent CLI, IDE or CI processes using the same usage state.
Any HTTP 429 is treated as daily allocation exhaustion, so a transient throttle can incorrectly open the circuit until the next UTC day.
Equal-schema JSON candidates are selected by serialized length rather than final position, so an earlier verbose example can displace the later final answer.
